title: Prextex Christmas Lights 11.5m (38 ft) - 100 LED Warm White Bulbs on Green Wire - Indoor and Outdoor Christmas Fairy Lights for Tree, Wreath, and Garden with 8 Modes - Connect Upto 3 Light Strings
features: Warm Festive Ambience: These indoor and outdoor Christmas tree lights feature 100 warm white LEDs on a 11.5-metre green wire, well-suited for Christmas trees, wreaths, windows, and other holiday décor
Durable Weather-Resistant Design: Built to withstand any weather, these Christmas lights outdoor and indoor decor options shine brightly on patios, fences, or trees for reliable holiday illumination

Versatile Use: The LED lights are suitable for more than holidays; use them as Christmas window lights or for birthdays, weddings, or parties to create a warm, inviting glow throughout the entire year
Lighting Modes: The Christmas outdoor lights offer eight lighting modes, combination, sequential, in waves, twinkle/flashing, chasing/flash, slo-glo, slow fade, and steady, for flexible customisation
Simple and Expandable Setup: Easy to plug in and connect, these Christmas lights indoor and outdoor decor link up to 3 sets together, while providing an average of up to 2500 hours of illumination
description: Looking for reliable lights that make your home sparkle with warmth? The Prextex christmas tree light set brings festive cheer to every corner. With 100 LED bulbs on an 11.5-metre green wire, these led christmas tree lights warm white add a cozy glow for christmas tree string lights, windows, or garden displays. Designed for both indoor and outdoor use, these outdoor christmas tree lights combine brightness, safety, and durability for lasting enjoyment. These christmas lights tree and warm christmas tree lights feature eight lighting modes, including steady, twinkle lights, slow fade, and chasing flash, letting you customize your holiday ambience. The led christmas tree lights connect up to three strands together for wider coverage, making them ideal for decorating large trees or patios. Made to withstand the elements, these outdoor christmas tree lights mains powered stay bright, ensuring long-lasting glow. Suitable beyond the holidays, these indoor christmas lights double as tree lights indoor or light trees indoor for birthdays, weddings, or cozy setups. With up to 2,500 hours of illumination, it's a christmas led lights indoor that maintain brightness for every occasion. Their green wire blends with green christmas tree lights or garlands for a polished look that complements any décor. The versatile twinkling christmas lights are great for pairing with 10m fairy lights or 20 warm white fairy lights plug in to create layers of light. Use them as christmas lights for tree indoor or small christmas tree lights mains to highlight your décor. From warm tones to bright white christmas tree lights or ice white christmas lights, they fit into any style. Whether you’re setting up xmas lights tree or decorating with 400 led christmas tree lights warm white setup, these lights for christmas tree deliver charm, elegance, and reliability. Durable and energy-efficient, this Prextex set of 100 led christmas tree lights adds timeless sparkle to every celebration.
